what_it_does: This file is a ledger record for a design-source image asset named p-29 in the capital-raise channel; it stores YAML frontmatter metadata and a one-line body label identifying the image as source design ground-truth.
observations: YAML frontmatter declares id capital-raise/p-29, address image://design-source/capital-raise/p-29, channel design-source, path capital-raise/p-29, and a blob URI blob://b2:176f15b96a2f642f8a54d70c78d5dbaf.
mime is image/jpeg but width and height are both 0.
source is design_source_material, author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r, created is 2026-06-22T11:30:59.411463+00:00, and links is an empty list.
The body after the frontmatter reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — capital-raise/p-29.jpg'.
standouts: Width and height are recorded as 0 despite the file being an image/jpeg ledger entry.
The links array is empty, so no explicit relationships are declared.
The blob URI is the only content pointer for the actual image data.
The body explicitly labels the entry as 'SOURCE design ground-truth'.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a fixed set of metadata fields for ledger entries.
Follows an image:// channel addressing scheme and a blob:// content reference scheme.
Separates machine-readable metadata from a short human-readable source label.
concerns: Recording w: 0 and h: 0 for an image asset may indicate missing or uncomputed dimensions.
The empty links array leaves the asset without declared relationships to other ledger entries.
There is no alt text, caption, or content description for accessibility or search.
notes: A sparse ledger stub for a capital-raise design-source image that points to a blob but lacks dimensions and relationships.
questions: Why are the image width and height set to 0?
What visual content does capital-raise/p-29.jpg contain?
Is this asset intended to be referenced by other design or code files?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to record a design-source image asset; the file does exactly that, though its metadata is incomplete (zero dimensions, no links).
intention_signals: The file appears to be trying to register a source image from the capital-raise design materials in a traceable, addressable ledger so it can be referenced as ground truth.
contribution: Provides a stable, addressable ledger entry and blob pointer for a design-source image asset, capturing authorship, timestamp, and channel identity even though dimensions and relationships are absent.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger stub for the design-source JPEG image capital-raise/p-29, identified by image://design-source/capital-raise/p-29 and referenced by blob://b2:176f15b96a2f642f8a54d70c78d5dbaf, with zero recorded dimensions and no declared links.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to register a source design ground-truth image for the capital-raise channel in a traceable, blob-referenced ledger.
